scripts.prebuild: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); fs.rmSync('dist', { recursive: true, force: true }); fs.mkdirSync('dist', { recursive: true });"
scripts.build: npm run prebuild && npm run build:css && npm run build:js && node -e "const fs = require('fs'); fs.copyFileSync('./index.html', './dist/index.html'); fs.copyFileSync('./favicon.svg', './dist/favicon.svg'); fs.copyFileSync('./logo.png', './dist/logo.png');"
scripts.validate: npm run test && npm run lint
